payload.title: Financial and Ridership Reports – January 2024
payload.description: Metro-North Railroad financial and ridership report for January 2024, including budget performance, revenues, expenses, staffing, and performance indicators.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total revenue of $59.6 million was $7.2 million lower than the Adopted Budget.
Farebox revenue of $46.2 million was $2.7 million higher than the Budget.

tool_args.label: Total Expenses before Non-Cash Liability Adjustments January YTD

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $143.8 million were $10.2 million or 6.6% favorable to the Budget.
At the end of January, the total headcount was 6,547 which was 63 higher than the Budget of 6,484.

tool_args.label: Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio YTD January 2024
Adjusted Cost per Passenger YTD January 2024

payload.claim_text: Total revenue of $59.6 million was $7.2 million lower than the Adopted Budget, reflecting lower capital reimbursements partially offset by higher ridership revenue.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Labor Expenses: $8.0 million unfavorable to the Budget.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Non-Labor Expenses: $9.2 million favorable to the Budget.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Total overtime was $2.0 million unfavorable to the Budget. Unfavorable non-reimbursable overtime was primarily driven by scheduled service needs, higher programmatic maintenance, vacancy coverage requirements and weather emergencies.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenues were $2.7 million favorable to the Budget due to increased ridership volumes across all East of Hudson lines.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Total Revenue Budget vs Actual January YTD
Total Expenses Budget vs Actual January YTD
Total Positions Budget vs Actual January 2024

payload.claim_text: Maintenance of Equipment and Maintenance of Way variances reflect higher attrition than planned (A) and delayed hiring of vacant positions (B).
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.raw_value_text: Net Surplus/(Deficit) - Accrued ($111.9) Budget, ($110.0) Actual, $1.9 Variance
Overtime expenses were $3.4 million unfavorable to the Budget
Electric Power costs were $4.3 million favorable to the Budget due to lower rates
Fuel expenses were $1.2 million favorable to the Budget due to lower rates and usage
Maintenance and Other Operating Contracts were $2.9 million favorable to the Budget
Reimbursable Overhead expenses were $3.7 million unfavorable to the Budget

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are not intended for use in the preparation of the annual report. Actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

tool_args.label: Total Expenses before Non-Cash Liability Adj January 2024

payload.raw_value_text: Total Expenses before Non-Cash Liability Adj. Adopted Budget $154,015 Actual $143,777 Variance $10,238 6.6%
Net Cash Deficit (excludes Opening Cash Balance) ($79,065) Budget ($70,950) Actual $8,116 Variance 10.3%

payload.raw_value_text: Maintenance of Equipment Budget 1,647 Actual 1,590 Variance 57
Maintenance of Way Budget 2,239 Actual 2,145 Variance 94

tool_args.label: Standard Farebox Operating Ratio YTD January 2024
Standard Cost per Passenger YTD January 2024

payload.claim_text: Monthly Performance Indicators include both East and West of Hudson revenue and expenses. Adjusted Fare Operating Ratio has been adjusted for comparability between Metro-North and the LIRR and include Inclusion of Other Operating Revenue, Removal of OPEB retiree expenses, and Inclusion of estimated farebox revenue from equalization of Connecticut fare structure.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

Metro-North Railroad cost and revenue per passenger metrics
